title: Robbery at 3 O'clock
writer: Pedro Masó, Vicente Coello, Rafael J. Salvia
actors: José Luis López Vázquez, Cassen, Gracita Morales
plot: Galindo works in a bank. One day he convinces the other employees in the bank to plan a hold-up in the bank they are working. They prepare everything carefully. However, real robbers come just before the fake ones.
